title: My English Voice: Grade 6 Capstone Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not allowed by law or rules
choices: illegal
instrument
originally
rounds.answer: illegal
rounds.explanation: illegal: Not allowed by law or rules

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A leader who has complete power and makes all the rules without asking others.
choices: illegal
instrument
dictator
rounds.answer: dictator
rounds.explanation: dictator: A leader who has complete power and makes all the rules without asking others.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
choices: instrument
firmly
illegal
rounds.answer: firmly
rounds.explanation: firmly: In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The act of going into a place, or the way to get in
rounds.answer: entry

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A leader who has complete power and makes all the rules without asking others.
rounds.answer: dictator

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
rounds.answer: firmly

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: It is illegal to steal someone else's property.
She plays the piano, which is a musical instrument.
The dark clouds are a threat of a coming storm.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
A short trip or journey, usually for fun or learning.
An area of land that belongs to a person, group, or country.
rounds.answer: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
rounds.explanation: The ships passed through the straits to get to the other side of the island.

choices: A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
A person who travels to new places to discover things.
An area of land that belongs to a person, group, or country.
The process of finding your way from one place to another.
rounds.answer: A person who travels to new places to discover things.
rounds.explanation: The explorer found a new island in the ocean.

choices: Easily affected by things around you, like feelings or physical things.
In a strong and steady way; not easily moved or changed.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
rounds.answer: Not thinking that you are better than others; modest.
rounds.explanation: Even though he won the race, he remained humble and thanked his friends for their support.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What is the central idea of this text?
choices: Accept an accurate response supported by the selected review text.
Not allowed by law or rules
A person who follows the teachings of Jesus Christ
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate response supported by the selected review text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate response supported by the selected review text.

Accept an accurate response supported by the selected review text.

Accept an accurate response supported by the selected review text.

rounds.answer: Accept an accurate response supported by the selected review text.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: Explain three portfolio choices and support each choice with precise evidence.
She plays the piano, which is a musical instrument.
six audience questions with relevant evidence and thoughtful clarification.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The explorer found a new island in the ocean.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She eagerly opened her birthday presents.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Bees help with pollination by moving pollen between flowers.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'straits' mean in this unit?
choices: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
Not allowed by law or rules
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
rounds.answer: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
rounds.explanation: straits: A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.

rounds.prompt: What does 'script' mean in this unit?
choices: Not allowed by law or rules
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.
rounds.answer: A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.
rounds.explanation: script: A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.

rounds.prompt: What does 'instrument' mean in this unit?
choices: At the beginning or in the first place
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
Not allowed by law or rules
rounds.answer: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
rounds.explanation: instrument: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

choices: Adjective
Noun
Verb
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: humble is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

choices: Verb
Adjective
Noun
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: pollination is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

choices: Adjective
Noun
Verb
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: agency is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

pairs: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
The ability to create ideas or pictures in your mind
Dangerous and not safe, often because it is not what it seems.
A narrow body of water between two pieces of land.
A group of people travelling together, often across a desert.
Not enough; very small in amount or quality.
A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.
The way heat or electricity moves through a material.
The process of digging in the ground to find things like fossils or old buildings.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

choices: A person who speaks for God or tells what will happen in the future
At the beginning or in the first place
The ability to make choices and take action
To become worse or to decline in quality
rounds.answer: At the beginning or in the first place
rounds.explanation: Originally, the story was written as a book before it became a movie.

choices: A difficult situation that causes suffering or trouble.
A leader who has complete power and makes all the rules without asking others.
Something that can cause harm or danger.
To treat someone in a cruel or unfair way, making them feel weak or powerless.
rounds.answer: Something that can cause harm or danger.
rounds.explanation: The dark clouds are a threat of a coming storm.

choices: A difficult situation that causes suffering or trouble.
Dangerous and not safe, often because it is not what it seems.
To treat someone badly or unfairly because of their beliefs or identity.
To treat someone in a cruel or unfair way, making them feel weak or powerless.
rounds.answer: Dangerous and not safe, often because it is not what it seems.
rounds.explanation: The path through the mountains was treacherous after the rains.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

choices: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
Gave or provided something that was needed
Not allowed by law or rules
The act of going into a place, or the way to get in
rounds.answer: Not allowed by law or rules
rounds.explanation: It is illegal to steal someone else's property.

choices: A person who follows the teachings of Jesus Christ
A pleasing combination of things that work well together; peace
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
Gave or provided something that was needed
rounds.answer: A person who follows the teachings of Jesus Christ
rounds.explanation: My friend is a citizen and goes to church every Sunday.

choices: A person who speaks for God or tells what will happen in the future
Related to the physical features of the Earth and how places are arranged
The ability to create ideas or pictures in your mind
The ability to make choices and take action
rounds.answer: Related to the physical features of the Earth and how places are arranged
rounds.explanation: The geographic features of our country include mountains, rivers, and valleys.
